name: PCGenerativeHead
description: Per-layer top-down predictor for predictive coding. Generates predictions of the layer below via norm + linear + activation.
code:
_pcgh{{_id}}_mean = np.mean({{hidden}}, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_pcgh{{_id}}_var = np.var({{hidden}}, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_pcgh{{_id}}_normed = ({{hidden}} - _pcgh{{_id}}_mean) / np.sqrt(_pcgh{{_id}}_var + {{eps}})
_pcgh{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn({{d_out}}, {{d_in}}).astype(np.float32) * 0.02
_pcgh{{_id}}_b = np.zeros({{d_out}}, dtype=np.float32)
_pcgh{{_id}}_pre = np.dot(_pcgh{{_id}}_normed, _pcgh{{_id}}_W.T) + _pcgh{{_id}}_b
{{prediction}} = np.maximum(0.0, _pcgh{{_id}}_pre)
